About

A little about me

I've always been a stubborn and curious kid — never giving up easily, always eager to learn something new. That mix of persistence and curiosity led me to the world of data, where every dataset is a story waiting to be told.

My enthusiasm and sense of responsibility helped me grow into someone who genuinely enjoys hard problems, communicates confidently, and is constantly exploring what's possible with data and analytics.

CVM Solutions, Hyderabad · Dec 2022 – May 2024

Projects

Healthcare Data Analytics Dashboard

Built a comprehensive Power BI dashboard on 500K+ patient records using SQL Server with dimensional modeling. Visualized critical KPIs including admission trends, treatment effectiveness, and resource utilization — with a 40% query speed improvement through optimization.

Power BI SQL Server Python

Customer Sales Analytics & Forecasting

Developed an ETL pipeline for 2M+ retail records into BigQuery with 99%+ data quality. Trained ARIMA and Linear Regression models achieving 85% forecasting accuracy, with interactive Power BI dashboards for sales trends and customer segmentation.

BigQuery Python ARIMA ML Models

Real-Time Business Intelligence Dashboards

Designed and deployed 15+ executive dashboards using Power BI and Snowflake, enabling real-time KPI monitoring. Applied data storytelling principles to translate complex metrics into clear, actionable business intelligence for stakeholders.

Power BI Snowflake Data Modeling
